analysis.reasoning: Core message: Informational announcement that the UN General Assembly high-level week will occur, and President Putin will lead the Russian delegation and deliver remarks via video on day one. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): Not present; no criticism of the West or its allies. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system): Not present; no mention of multipolarity or alternative frameworks; simply notes participation in UN. RU3 (Russia as benevolent partner): Not present; no claims about peace, solidarity, or partnership. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not present; no historical references. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront): Not present; while it highlights Putin’s participation, it does not claim superiority, success, or leadership. RU6 (Russia’s culture/nature/heritage): Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet is a neutral scheduling announcement and does not promote any listed narrative.
